allow: PowerShell(cd C:\\WorkSpace\\signagepro\\dashboard; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd C:\\WorkSpace\\signagepro\\dashboard; npm run dev" -WindowStyle Normal)

PowerShell(cd C:\\WorkSpace\\signagepro\\server; for \($i = 1; $i -le 12; $i++\) { $result = node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('./node_modules/@prisma/client'\); const prisma = new PrismaClient\(\); prisma.device.findMany\({ orderBy: { lastSeen: 'desc' } }\).then\(devices => { devices.forEach\(d => { const ago = d.lastSeen ? Math.round\(\(Date.now\(\) - new Date\(d.lastSeen\)\)/1000\) : null; console.log\(d.name + ' | ' + d.status + ' | ' + ago + '초 전'\); }\); }\);"; Write-Host "[$i/12] $\(Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm:ss'\) — $result"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 })
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name node | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 28072 } | Select-Object Id, CPU)
